title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.

title: Sarpatta The Warrior
subTitle: A young man living in the segregated Madras of the 1970s is presented with the opportunity to revive his boxing career and his clan. He decides to take it but soon faces challenges in his path.

title: Biskut
subTitle: A young man, who works at his father's biscuit factory, meets a woman in a nursing home. However, he soon discovers her narrated tales are strangely coming true in reality.

title: Ek Tsunami: Jwalamukhi
subTitle: A man wakes up from a coma and becomes confused when everyone calls him Godse. Soon, he finds himself in the middle of a conspiracy started by a corrupt chief minister.

title: Rama Rao on Duty
subTitle: A courageous and honest police officer investigates the case of the missing husband of his ex-girlfriend, which leads him to bust a scam pertaining to the illegal smuggling of red sandalwood.

title: House Mates
subTitle: Newlyweds Karthik and Anu move into an old apartment where strange occurrences unsettle their lives, leading them to uncover a paranormal mystery involving another family nearby.

title: Baahubali
subTitle: Raised by a tribe, a young man sets out to help his lady love rescue an enslaved princess of a kingdom that is ruled by a tyrannical king. In doing so, he soon discovers his true identity.

title: Lakshya
subTitle: Karan, an aimless young man, joins the Indian Army on a whim but backs out when he finds a soldier's life to be difficult. When this creates conflict with his girlfriend, he rejoins to make her proud.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 2
subTitle: Rocky successfully rises as the leader and saviour of the people of the Kolar Gold Fields. But, in his goal to fulfil his mother's wishes, Rocky must tackle Adheera, Inayat Khalil and Ramika Sen.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
subTitle: After learning that his father was brutally killed by Bhallaladeva, Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat him and release his mother from the former's captivity.

title: Thandel
subTitle: Raju, an Indian fisherman, is arrested after accidentally straying into foreign waters and faces a fraught journey home to his beloved Satya.

title: Thandel
subTitle: Raju, an Indian fisherman, is arrested after accidentally straying into foreign waters and faces a fraught journey home to his beloved Satya.

title: Connect
subTitle: Susan, the mother of Anna, a teenage girl, seeks virtual help from a pastor to perform an exorcism through an online video call.

title: Taana
subTitle: A determined young man dreams of becoming a police officer, but his nervous voice disorder holds him back. Subsequently, he decides to overcome his fear to prove his worth and fight for his dream.

title: Extraaa Storiez
subTitle: The host presents various snippets of information and behind the scenes from the sets of 'K.G.F: Chapter 2', a 2022 Kannada film.

title: Godzilla
subTitle: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York city in order to feed and protect its brood.

title: Lokah Chapter 1: Chandra
subTitle: A youthful woman uncovers mystical skills while facing personal hurdles. Meanwhile, as evil surfaces, she must embrace her powers and fate in a shifting world.

title: King Kong
subTitle: An eccentric director, Carl Denham and his crew make their way to film on the perilous Skull Island, home to several wayward creatures including a gigantic ape named Kong.

title: Kantara
subTitle: When greed paves the way for betrayal, scheming and murder, a young tribal reluctantly dons the traditions of his ancestors to seek justice.

title: Super Daddy
subTitle: A man dealing with a financial crisis and a prosthetic leg struggles to get his daughter operated on for a heart problem.

title: Maari
subTitle: Maariyappan, a gangster, is confronted by Gangadhar Beeja, a rival. While he strives to defeat him, he attempts to cope with his son's questionable behaviour.

title: Mahavatar Narsimha
subTitle: Hiranyakashyap, a demon, challenges Vishnu, proclaiming himself a god. However, his son Prahlad remains devoted to Vishnu, who appears as Narsimha to defeat the demon.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
subTitle: Rocky, a young man, seeks power and wealth in order to fulfil a promise to his dying mother. His quest takes him to Mumbai, where he gets involved with the notorious gold mafia.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
subTitle: Rocky, a young man, seeks power and wealth in order to fulfil a promise to his dying mother. His quest takes him to Mumbai, where he gets involved with the notorious gold mafia.

title: Driver Jamuna
subTitle: Jamuna, a cab driver, accidentally becomes an accomplice to a crime. Later, she tries to get herself out of the mess she is dragged in.

title: Raja Vamsam
subTitle: While working on a significant project for his company, a young man visits his hometown to meet his future wife and see his family. However, he discovers that she actually loves his relative.

title: Extraaa Storiez
subTitle: Director Apoorv Singh Karki along with the cast and the crew behind the movie 'Bhaiyya Ji' candidly share their experiences during production.

title: Chhorii
subTitle: A pregnant woman and her husband relocate to a remote house, where a series of terrifying paranormal events threaten her life.

title: Final Destination Bloodlines
subTitle: Stefanie, a college student, suffers from a recurring nightmare. Subsequently, she heads back to her hometown in a bid to find the person who can help her family avoid their brutal fate.

title: Bhool Chuk Maaf
subTitle: A young man, from a small town, with romantic inclinations gets gainfully employed to marry the woman he desires. However, he breaks an oath to Lord Shiva and becomes trapped for his reneging.

title: Waltair Veerayya
subTitle: A desperate smuggler finds himself strapped for cash. Later, when an agent offers him a fortune to extradite a notorious drug lord from Malaysia, he accepts only to face a world of betrayal.

title: Action
subTitle: Subhash, an army man, seeks vengeance when a conspiracy claims his loved ones. He investigates the plot and takes matters into his own hands, mounting a daring operation to capture the culprit.

title: Spark: L.I.F.E.
subTitle: Jay's love for Ananya makes way for a string of lethal events while Lekha's dreams clash with Arya's. Soon, when the suicide killings create havoc in the nation, an evil force connects their lives.

title: Animal
subTitle: The hard-hearted son of a successful factory owner returns to his family after spending years in abroad and pledges to seek revenge on the people who pose a threat to his father's life.

title: Gangers
subTitle: Saravanan, an undercover officer disguised as a PT master, confronts merciless criminals, unearths their fraud and recruits school personnel to dismantle their operation.

title: Godse
subTitle: Terror and turmoil fill the air when many prominent leaders are held hostage by Godse. This triggers an investigation by a diligent police officer who sets off to probe Godse's motive.
